items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom Unveil LLM-Optimized Inference Chip
items.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom have collaborated to introduce a new inference chip specifically designed to optimize the performance and efficiency of large language models.

items.title: Mark Zuckerberg Expresses Disappointment in AI Agent Progress
items.summary: Mark Zuckerberg reportedly informed Meta staff that the development of AI agents has not advanced as rapidly as he had initially anticipated.

items.title: Listen Labs Secures $69M to Scale AI Customer Interview Platform
items.summary: Listen Labs successfully raised $69 million in funding following a viral billboard campaign, aiming to expand its AI-powered platform for conducting customer interviews.

items.title: Program-as-Weights: A Novel Programming Paradigm for Fuzzy Functions
items.summary: Researchers introduce 'Program-as-Weights,' a new programming paradigm that allows fuzzy functions to be represented and manipulated directly as model weights.

items.title: AgenticSTS: A Bounded-Memory Testbed for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
items.summary: A new testbed called AgenticSTS is presented, designed to evaluate the performance of long-horizon LLM agents under constraints of bounded memory.

items.title: EvoPolicyGym: Evaluating Autonomous Policy Evolution in Interactive Environments
items.summary: EvoPolicyGym offers a new framework for evaluating how autonomous policies evolve and adapt within complex interactive environments.

items.title: PerceptionRubrics: Calibrating Multimodal Evaluation to Human Perception
items.summary: PerceptionRubrics introduces a method to align multimodal AI evaluation metrics more closely with human perceptual judgments, improving assessment accuracy.

items.title: Morphing into Hybrid Attention Models for Enhanced Performance
items.summary: This research explores the concept of 'morphing' into hybrid attention models to achieve improved performance in various AI tasks.

items.title: AgenticDataBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Data Agents
items.summary: AgenticDataBench is introduced as a new, comprehensive benchmark specifically designed to evaluate the capabilities and performance of data-centric AI agents.

items.title: ELDR: Expert-Locality-Aware Decode Routing for PD-Disaggregated MoE Serving
items.summary: ELDR proposes an expert-locality-aware decode routing mechanism to enhance the serving efficiency of Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models in PD-disaggregated systems.

items.title: Seed2.0 Model Card: Towards Intelligence Frontier for Real-World Complexity
items.summary: The Seed2.0 Model Card outlines advancements aimed at pushing the intelligence frontier for AI models to better handle real-world complexities.

items.title: Multi-Resolution Flow Matching: Training-Free Diffusion Acceleration via Staged Sampling
items.summary: A novel technique called Multi-Resolution Flow Matching is presented, enabling training-free acceleration of diffusion models through staged sampling.

items.title: MemSyco-Bench: Benchmarking Sycophancy in Agent Memory
items.summary: MemSyco-Bench is a new benchmark designed to measure and analyze sycophantic behaviors in the memory systems of AI agents.

items.title: WorldDirector: Building Controllable World Simulators with Persistent Dynamic Memory
items.summary: WorldDirector introduces a method for creating controllable world simulators equipped with persistent dynamic memory, enhancing realism and interaction.

items.title: I Built a Trust Firewall for My AI Agent's Memory on Cognee's Four Verbs
items.summary: A developer shares insights on implementing a 'trust firewall' for an AI agent's memory, leveraging Cognee's conceptual framework to enhance reliability.
